DEFECT.DESCRIPTION: If you define or delete any default operation in the type 'class Activity', define or delete them all (c.21).

Don't pass a pointer that may be invalid to a function. Parameter 0 '@(temporary 1)' in call to 'std::vector<UndoAction * __ptr64,std::allocator<UndoAction * __ptr64> >::_Unchecked_begin' may be invalid (lifetime.3).
If you define or delete any default operation in the type 'class Repo<class UndoAction *>', define or delete them all (c.21).
If you define or delete any default operation in the type 'class Repo<class Activity>', define or delete them all (c.21).
Prefer to use gsl::at() instead of unchecked subscript operator (bounds.4).
